programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - 2nd Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: In the second judges' auditions our amateur cooks are given one hour to cook their best dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Final Round Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: With the Final Round of the Judge's Audition comes the First Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - First Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: 2015's Masterchef, Billie McKay, knows exactly what this crop of aspirants are going through.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - First Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Three contestants choose a cloche containing a single ingredient to be used in a dish for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Marco Pierre White
programme.desc: The hopeful chefs suit up and show up for Marco Pierre White Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Marco Pierre White's John Dory
programme.desc: Tasks include mystery boxes, celebrity chef challenges, masterclasses and off-site challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge: Jake Kellie
programme.desc: The top three contestants from the invention test must make a filled pasta with a matching sauce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: This challenge is all about the pub lunch.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test & Masterclass
programme.desc: Contestants from the losing challenge team must correctly name an ingredient to avoid the cook-off challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Viewers
programme.desc: This mystery box challenge has been chosen by the viewers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants with the least impressive dishes face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge: Popcorn
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test must create a dish using popcorn as the core ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Service Challenge
programme.desc: In this service challenge, the contestants are split into two teams.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge: No Cooking
programme.desc: The bottom three will then cook-off to avoid elimination from the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box: Nigella Lawson
programme.desc: It's Nigella Lawson Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Nigella Lawson's Three-Course Meal
programme.desc: Contestants have just one hour to recreate Nigella's three-course meal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge: Midnight Snack
programme.desc: Matt Preston and Nigella Lawson arrive at the contestant house in the middle of the night.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Fete
programme.desc: Each team must prepare one savoury dish and two sweet dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge: Name That Cake & MasterClass 2
programme.desc: The losing fete challenge team now face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box
programme.desc: The contestants have 60 minutes to create a dish using the ingredients in the mystery box.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Jason Atherton's Quail Afternoon Tea Dish
programme.desc: The bottom three from the invention test now face the elimination pressure test.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP8
programme.desc: Eight $1 million cases are added to a Minnesota woman's game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP83
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: With immunity up for grabs, contestants will work in pairs to create a savoury & sweet jaffle in 45 minutes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Off-site Challenge: Hellenic Republic
programme.desc: Today's off-site challenge will take place at George Calombaris' Hellenic Republic restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge: Blind Taste Test
programme.desc: The losing Greek feast challenge team now face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: The Queen of the Australian kitchen, Maggie Beer returns!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Anna Polyviou's Mess
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the mystery box challenge face off in the elimination pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers from Maggie Beer's mystery box are now vying for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Chinese New Year
programme.desc: Today's challenge marks the celebration of Chinese New Year joined by guest mentor, Kylie Kwong.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the Chinese New Year challenge must now cook a dish determined by lucky dip.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Luke Nguyen & Invention Test
programme.desc: Today's mystery box challenge has been set by guest chef Luke Nguyen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Ross Lusted
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face off in the elimination pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Top 12
programme.desc: The judges reveal to the top 12 contestants that there are some special guests who will be joining them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: Guest chef Curtis Stone joins today's off-site team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the Curtis Stone challenge now face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Ugly Ingredients & Invention Test: Relay
programme.desc: Today's mystery box challenge contains eight of the ugliest ingredients ever seen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Flynn McGarry
programme.desc: The losing team from the invention test relay challenge now face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge: Victor Liong
programme.desc: The four contestants who impressed in the relay invention test cook for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Gourmet Cinema
programme.desc: The judges reveal that the contestants must cater for 165 cinema goers at a very special cinema event.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the gourmet cinema challenge are now cooking to save themselves from elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Heston Week
programme.desc: Heston Week. Heston Blumenthal returns to MasterChef Australia in the biggest week ever.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Brighton Beach Ice Cream Stands
programme.desc: Melbourne's iconic Brighton Beach bathing boxes become ice cream stands.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Three-Course Dessert Spread
programme.desc: Heston inspires the contestants to create a three-course dessert spread using only the food of the Gods.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP22
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.
